summary: Iteration 28 testing completed - All 14 features verified. Milestones page now shows LIST/TABLE view with milestone count badges. Cashflow page shows project list with Resources column and wave-wise breakdown with Cash-In/Cash-Out. Both pages have working Excel export. Backend APIs return wave_data and combined_data arrays as expected.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height - recharts library issue but does not affect functionality

passed_tests: 2. Milestones sidebar shows project LIST/TABLE view with columns: Project#, Name, Version, Waves, Milestones, Open - PASS
3. Milestone count badges show for ewf=2, dasg=2 - PASS
4. Cashflow sidebar shows project LIST/TABLE view with Resources column - PASS
5. Cashflow project list shows only projects with resource data (ewf, dasg, dasg Copy) - PASS
6. Click ewf in Cashflow list - wave-wise breakdown appears with W1 (Copy) section - PASS
7. W1 (Copy) wave section shows monthly rows M1-M5 with Cash-Out and Cash-In columns - PASS
8a. Cash-In at M2 shows $25,000 (from milestones) - PASS
8b. Cash-In at M5 shows $60,000 (from milestones) - PASS
9. Combined Monthly Summary section appears with cumulative tracking - PASS
10. Export Excel on Cashflow page works - PASS
11. Export Excel button exists on Milestones page - PASS
12. Export Excel on Milestones page works (shows 'Milestones exported to Excel' toast) - PASS
13. Backend API: GET /api/projects/{id}/cashflow returns wave_data AND combined_data arrays - PASS (verified via pytest)
14. Wave collapse/expand works on cashflow page - PASS

backend_api_tests.GET /api/projects?latest_only=true: PASS - Returns projects list for table views
backend_api_tests.GET /api/projects/{id}/milestones: PASS - Returns milestones array with correct structure
backend_api_tests.GET /api/projects/{id}/cashflow: PASS - Returns wave_data, combined_data, and summary
backend_api_tests.POST /api/download-file: PASS - Returns download_id for Excel export

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features implemented and working correctly
Milestones page correctly shows LIST/TABLE view instead of card view
Cashflow page correctly filters to show only projects with resource data
Wave-wise breakdown properly separates cash flow by wave
Cash-In (revenue) correctly comes from payment milestones at target months
Combined Monthly Summary correctly sums M1 of Wave1 + M1 of Wave2 etc.
Excel export generates files with formulas (PaymentAmount = WaveSP * PaymentPct)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing projects: ewf (PRJ-0022) with 2 milestones, dasg (PRJ-0023) with 2 milestones.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 features all verified: 1) Milestones page (/payment-milestones) - LIST/TABLE view with columns Project#, Name, Version, Waves, Milestones count badge, Open button; 2) Cashflow page (/cashflow) - LIST/TABLE view showing only projects with resource data, columns include Resources count; 3) Cashflow detail page shows wave-wise breakdown with Cash-Out/Cash-In columns, Combined Monthly Summary with cumulative tracking; 4) Both pages have working Export Excel buttons; 5) Cash-In values correctly populated from payment milestones mapped by target_month. Test data: ewf (PRJ-0022, id: bcb545cf-efb8-4b5f-b5d4-8db988080a68) has 2 milestones (M2=$25,000, M5=$60,000); dasg (PRJ-0023, id: 0a7d0101-4c39-4398-af84-dafef153d3a8) has 2 milestones.
